system.description: Aerial agility, balance work, rope climbing, and tumbling.
system.notes: Use Sense of Balance at 60% +5% per level. Use Walk Tightrope or High Wire at 60% +3% per level. Use Climb Rope at 80% +2% per level. Use Back Flip at 60% +5% per level.

system.description: General athletic conditioning for contests of strength, endurance, and agility.
system.notes: Use this as broad athletic conditioning rather than a percentile skill roll.

system.description: Muscle building and weight training for raw strength.
system.notes: Apply these bonuses while the character keeps up the conditioning that earned them.

system.description: Classic fist-fighting training that sharpens reflexes, endurance, and punching power.
system.notes: A natural 20 body punch can knock the victim out. Roll 1D6 melees for the knockout duration if the group wants to track the full time spent unconscious.

system.description: Tools and techniques for climbing sheer surfaces and rappelling.
system.notes: Roll once for every 20 feet of vertical climbing. One failed roll means the climber is losing their grip; a second failed roll means a fall. Use Rappelling at 30% +5% per level when descending by rope, helicopter line, wall, or cliff.

system.description: Falls, rolls, tumbles, rope work, and balance training on bars and rings.
system.notes: Use Sense of Balance at 50% +5% per level. Use Parallel Bars and Rings at 60% +3% per level. Use Climb Rope at 70% +2% per level. Use Back Flip at 70% +5% per level.

system.description: Move quietly, slowly, and carefully enough to slip by unseen.
system.notes: A failed roll means the character has been seen or heard. A successful roll can set up a sneak attack or quiet approach.

system.description: Steady running and exercise that build speed and endurance.
system.notes: Apply these gains after the character completes the conditioning represented by the skill.

system.description: Keeping afloat, diving, lifesaving, and efficient swim technique.
system.notes: A swimmer can cover a distance equal to three times P.S. in yards or meters per melee and can keep up that pace for a number of minutes equal to P.E. Handle water movement and fatigue at the table for now.

system.description: Skin diving and underwater swimming with a self-contained breathing rig.
system.notes: A diver can cover a distance equal to two times P.S. in yards or meters per melee and can keep up that pace for a number of minutes equal to P.E. Maximum safe depth without the bends is about 120 feet. Handle decompression, depth, and underwater hazards at the table for now.

system.description: School and collegiate wrestling that teaches leverage, pins, and close control.
system.notes: Body block or tackle does 1D4 damage and can knock an opponent down if they fail to dodge or parry. Crush or squeeze does 1D4 damage per attack. On a natural 18, 19, or 20, the wrestler can pin and incapacitate the opponent; resolve the exact hold at the table.

system.description: Spring backward to clear space, recover footing, or escape a close rush.
system.specialRules: Use this when the character has room to flip clear. Resolve exact distance, footing, and obstacles at the table.

system.description: Training with bows, slings, spears, and similar missile weapons.
system.notes: This proficiency covers thrown spears, slings, bows, and crossbows. When firing from horseback or a moving vehicle, cut the normal rate of fire in half and handle any lost bonuses at the table.

system.description: Training with clubs, maces, hammers, staves, and other blunt weapons.
Training with chain weapons, flails, and nunchaku.
Training with combat knives, utility knives, and thrown blades.
Training with short swords, sabers, rapiers, and two-handed blades.
Training with cylinder handguns.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to revolvers and similar sidearms. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with automatic pistols and machine pistols.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to automatic pistols. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with hunting rifles, precision rifles, and other bolt-action long arms.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to bolt-action rifles and hunting rifles. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with assault rifles and other self-loading rifles.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to automatic and semi-automatic rifles. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with compact automatic firearms such as the Uzi.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to sub-machineguns. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with machineguns, bazookas, mortars, and similar heavy weapons.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to heavy support weapons. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with laser pistols and other energy sidearms.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to energy pistols. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with laser rifles and other long-range energy weapons.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to energy rifles. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.

system.description: Training with rail guns, plasma ejectors, and similar heavy energy weapons.
system.notes: Match this proficiency to heavy energy weapons. Until the full modern W.P. combat table is entered, use normal attack rolls and handle any special bonuses manually.
